NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-05-2010 CONTINUED TO FEB-04-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN 611 FOR STATUS. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED AND TESTIFIED. BASED ON THE EVIDENCE RECEIVED, JUDGE ROSS MADE THE FOLLOWING FINDING: WOLCHANSKY HAD INCOME IN 2010 FOR THE MONTHS OF JANUARY THROUGH NOVEMBER, 2010 IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $34,500 ($31,500 FROM EMPLOYMENT AND $3,000 FROM UNEMPLOYMENT COMPENSATION) SUFFICIENT FOR HIM TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $125. ON OR BEFORE FRIDAY NOVEMBER 19, WOLCHANSKY SHALL PAY IVELI THE SUM OF $500 REPRESENTING $125 MONTHLY FOR THE MONTHS OF AUGUST THROUGH NOVEMBER. THE PARTIES SHALL RETURN ON FRIDAY FEBRUARY 4, 2011 AT 8:30 A.M. FOR A FURTHER STATUS REPORT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WOLCHANSKY, MICHAEL
